source_jobs.title: Internal Operations
source_jobs.description:
About this role

We’re hiring an operations generalist to own and drive growing the Paraform team. You’ll work closely with our co-founders and leadership team, with the opportunity to grow into a senior operations role over time.



This is a unique role where you'll be the primary user of the Paraform platform, and have immense impact on product development: We've rapidly scaled to 60+ headcount by "dog-fooding" Paraform to leverage specialized recruiter networks to source elite talent. You'll collaborate with our co-founders and leadership team in using the Paraform product, and work directly with engineering & product teams to improve the platform based on your needs.



You’ll also be highly visible as the first team member many candidates interact with, serving as a direct extension of our brand.



We’re looking for someone who understands our culture, values strong organization, and can help us achieve our ambitious recruiting goals.



Responsibilities



Hiring:

Design and run an efficient hiring process that attracts and converts top candidates

 - Translate company priorities into clear hiring plans, job narratives, and candidate-facing materials in close partnership with hiring managers

 - Build and maintain strong talent pipelines by actively sourcing through Paraform and other targeted channels aligned with where top talent congregates

 - Lead candidate assessment end to end, focusing on motivation, role alignment, and long-term potential rather than checklist screening

 - Run a high-touch candidate experience that balances efficiency with a thoughtful, personal approach

 - Manage offers and closing in collaboration with founders and hiring managers

 - Own recruiting operations and logistics, including interview coordination and on-site execution

 - Continuously evolve hiring workflows, tools, and systems to improve signal quality, speed, and scalability



Project management:

Lead and execute cross-functional projects across people and business initiatives

 - Partner with marketing and operations to plan and run events

 - Assist with the planning and execution of team socials, offsites, dinners, and similar gatherings

 - Support the executive operations team in organizing and executing the annual company offsite




ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.



Our mission is to make hiring fast, reliable, and scalable for every company in the world.



At Paraform, we believe recruiting works best when the right people are working on the right problems, combining human judgment with AI that truly understands hiring. That’s why we’re building a new foundation for how companies hire, bringing together specialized recruiters and modern AI tools.



We treat recruiters like entrepreneurs, not vendors – and we’re building the financial, operational, and technical infrastructure that powers their success.



We are backed by the best investors and technology leaders: Felicis, A*, BOND, Liquid 2, DST Global, the founders of YouTube, Instacart, Canva, and more.

source_jobs.title: Manager, Strategic Projects
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We’re looking for a hungry, growth-obsessed operator and leader to help drive the next chapter of Paraform’s growth- while building their team around them.

Paraform’s customer base is growing rapidly (hundreds of new customers a month), and Strategic Project Leads are the commercial engine behind that growth. As an SPL Manager, you’ll start by learning the SPL role from the ground up — owning a book of business, running engagements, and driving hires as an individual contributor. Immediately, you’ll begin thinking and working to grow and optimize your vertical. From there, you’ll begin leading a team of SPLs, growing to ~6+ direct reports by the end of your first year.

This is more than a team lead role. You’ll help drive a vertical— driving marketplace density, deploying incentives, refining our delivery motion, and building toward P&L ownership as Paraform scales.

If you’re motivated by revenue ownership, energized by ambiguity, are excited to work with an exceptional team, and want to build something that matters — this is the role.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Months 1–2: Learn the role as an IC

 - Own a book of business end-to-end — build deep relationships with founders and executives, run structured intake calls, push back on comp and requirements when the data supports it, and drive hires with urgency and precision.

 - Be the quality layer — deeply understand each role, translate that into sharp recruiter briefs, and ensure only the strongest candidates reach hiring managers. Your judgment is the bar.

 - Leverage Paraform’s recruiter marketplace — mobilize recruiters, calibrate them in real time, and hold a high standard for quality and speed.

Months 2–12: Build and lead your vertical

 - Drive a vertical — drive marketplace density, deploy incentives strategically, and build toward target hires and revenue within your vertical. Work with partners across the business (e.g., Sales, Supply, Marketing) to unlock growth and efficiencies in your vertical

 - Coach and develop a team of SPLs — starting with 1–3 direct reports and growing to ~6-8+. Your vertical/team can continue to expand from there as you drive its growth.

 - Set the standard for delivery excellence — drive execution quality across your team’s engagements through coaching, live calibration, and direct feedback.

Ongoing

 - Shape how Paraform grows — feed customer insight back across the business and partner with sales, supply, product, and engineering to influence how the platform evolves at scale.

 - Build toward P&L ownership — as verticals mature, take on increasing commercial responsibility including role targets, hiring goals, incentive deployment across the business and more.


WHAT WE LOOK FOR

 - 4–7 years of experience, with a foundation in both problem-solving (e.g., consulting / MBB) and growth/revenue-focused operator roles (e.g., category management, partnerships, new verticals, GM)

 - Prior experience managing a multi-headcount team — you’ve coached and held people accountable to outcomes.

 - Track record of owning customer relationships and driving revenue — you’ve sold to or managed relationships with founders, CXOs, or senior operators.

 - You’re comfortable with performance-based comp and motivated by a target, not intimidated by it, and eager to grow your own slice of the business.

 - Exceptional 80/20 instincts — you know where to spend your time and don’t lose the thread across competing priorities.

 - Resourceful and creative — you’ve built things without a full toolkit, moved fast under ambiguity, and found the fix when the playbook didn’t exist.

 - Resilient and comfortable with ambiguity — you thrive when things aren’t fully figured out and can hold multiple threads without dropping them.

 - Caring, high-ownership leadership style — you set a high bar and invest in the people around you.

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication.

 - Bonus points for start up and/or marketplace experience (e.g., opera

source_jobs.title: Lead Product Manager - Growth
source_jobs.description:
About this role

Nearly $900B is spent on recruiting every year, yet the process is still broken. Paraform is building the global talent infrastructure where companies come to fill their most critical roles.

Through every search, placement, and interaction on our platform, we capture proprietary hiring data at scale. That data powers the agentic systems we are building to make hiring faster, smarter, and more precise.

We believe AI will create more jobs, not less by removing constraints and enabling companies to move faster and hire more ambitiously.

The role

We are looking for our first Lead Product Manager - Growth to own and accelerate Paraform’s entire growth funnel. You will work cross-functionally with Engineering, Design, Data, and Go-to-Market to identify the highest-leverage opportunities, ship experiments quickly, and scale what works.

This is a high-ownership role with meaningful scope. As the founding member of Paraform’s growth team, you will define strategy, execute end-to-end, be accountable for outcomes, hire and lead a small growth pod over time, and help drive the company’s hypergrowth.

What you will work on

Our current product roadmap focuses on three major areas. You will drive growth across them by improving the end-to-end funnel:

 - New candidate acquisition
   
   - Scale top channels (paid, organic, partnerships, referrals) and improve visit → signup conversion.
   
   - Design and optimize candidate referral programs that make it easy and rewarding for candidates to refer other high-quality candidates.
   
   - Identify viral loop opportunities where invited candidates can discover relevant roles, join Paraform, and refer more candidates from their own networks.
   
   - Run weekly experiments with clear hypotheses, success metrics, and rollout plans.
   
   - Build attribution and dashboards to optimize CAC, payback, channel quality, candidate referral coefficient, and loop velocity.

 - New candidate onboarding
   
   - Reduce time-to-value by simplifying first-run setup and key activation steps.
   
   - Improve completion rates via better UX, sequencing, and contextual guidance.
   
   - Personalize onboarding by segment and measure impact on activation and retention.

 - New candidate discovery
   
   - Improve matching, search, and recommendations to increase relevance and trust.
   
   - Drive repeat engagement with loops like saved searches, notifications, follow-ups, referrals, and shareable candidate or role moments.
   
   - Increase downstream outcomes (conversations, interviews, placements) and track quality metrics.

What we are looking for

 - Product-minded: You form strong opinions about what to build and why, grounded in user research, data, and first-principles thinking.

 - Growth-oriented: You have experience running experiments, improving funnels, and scaling what works.

 - Business-minded: You think in terms of revenue, retention, and market dynamics, not just shipped features.

 - Analytical: You can define success metrics, build instrumentation plans, and use data to make decisions.

 - High ownership/autonomy: You identify what needs to exist, make the plan, and execute.

 - Strong collaborator: You communicate clearly and build alignment across functions.

Qualifications

 - At least 4 years of product management experience.

 - At least 2 years of growth product experience.

 - A data analytics background is preferred.

 - Marketplace experience is preferred.

 - Marketing and Go-to-Market experience is preferred.

 - Experience leading 0→1 or step-function growth initiatives is preferred.

 - Leadership and team-building experience is preferred.

Why this role matters

Your work will directly shape how companies hire and how thousands of people find their next role. If you want to operate at the intersection of product, engineering, and business, this is the job.

Compensation & logistics

 - Salary: $150K – $250K

 - Equity: Competitive

 - Visa sponsorship: Case-

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for our second tenured PM to work very closely with our Co-founder/CTO Jeff https://www.linkedin.com/in/lijeffrey39/ and Founding PM Zach https://www.linkedin.com/in/zachary-lemos/ to build products that redefine the recruiting industry. You'll collaborate across all company functions to shape and ship products that will influence millions of candidates, recruiters, and hiring managers as well as the tooling our internal operations team uses every day to power the marketplace.



Responsibilities include:

 - Defining clear, measurable problems from ambiguous spaces

 - Setting a roadmap for a product initiative and owning prioritization, support sprint planning, issue triage, and backlog management

 - Driving the launch and ongoing operations of our suite of products while working closely with Design, Engineering and Operations

 - Rapid experimentation, developing hypotheses, and talking to customers often to iterate on ideas and validate use cases

 - Making data-driven decisions to uncover hidden patterns and answer key product questions

 - Acting as the glue for the company by synthesizing diverse feedback from all customers and internal functions to deliver high quality products

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.

source_jobs.title: Manager, Sales
source_jobs.description:
We're hiring a Sales Manager to drive new business for Paraform.

You'll manage our existing team of account executives and be responsible for hiring more account executives to our growing sales team. Reporting directly to our VP of Sales, this is an opportunity to build the foundational processes and behaviors for scaling the sales team. You'll have sellers across all 3 segments in SMB, MM, and ENT.



What we look for:

 - 1 - 3 years of experience as a top performing Sales Manager at a SaaS company.

 - Top performer - track record of top sales performance: quick promotions, consistently beating quota

 - Strong analytical and reporting around sales performance

 - Growth minded, both personally as well as for the people working for you



What you'll do:

 - Manage pipeline generation and deal execution across the AE team

 - Create best practices for pitching, demo'ing, and signing up Paraform customers

 - Report on sales performance to upper management

 - Hire and grow the team

 - Foster a competitive, high performance environment

source_jobs.title: Account Manager (Sales)
source_jobs.description:
What we're looking for:
We're looking for an experienced and dynamic account manager to expand our customers usage of Paraform's service. This ranges from early to mid to late stage funded startups who are growing rapidly and need an efficiently solution to scale headcount within their organization.



What you'll do:

This Account Manager will be responsible for servicing inbound expansion demand from our customers, as well as proactively reaching out to customers in their book of business to expand their use of Paraform's services.

Requirements:

 - 1 - 5 years of experience in sales, customer account management, or customer success ideally from a software startup background

 - 1+ years of managing customers and/or in a closing role

 - Has had targets focused on customer retainment/growth

 - Outbound prospecting experience

 - Track record of top sales performance

Nice to Have:

 - Experience in Venture Capital or Finance roles

 - Currently at VC- backed start up (Series A- D)

source_jobs.title: Founding Technical Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

Paraform is disrupting how companies hire — and we're looking for someone to help us hire the best people to do it. As our Founding Technical Recruiter, you'll own engineering and technical hiring end-to-end at a pivotal moment in our growth. This isn't a coordinator role or a req-filler — you'll be a true talent partner to our engineering and product leaders, shaping how we find and sell world-class technical talent on Paraform.

You'll be hands-on sourcing, closing, and iterating on our process — while also laying the recruiting infrastructure that scales with us.



What You'll Do

 - Own full-cycle recruiting for engineering, product, and design roles — from kickoff to close

 - Source proactively and build pipelines for hard-to-fill technical roles, with a bias toward finding non-obvious talent that others miss

 - Partner closely with hiring managers to deeply understand technical requirements, team dynamics, and what "great" actually looks like for each role

 - Define and continuously sharpen our interview process, scorecards, and candidate experience for technical hires

 - Build repeatable sourcing playbooks, calibration frameworks, and pipeline tracking that raise the bar over time

 - Serve as a genuine ambassador for Paraform's mission — you should be able to speak credibly about our product, our market, and why the best engineers should want to work here

 - Identify recruiting tooling, sourcing channels, and workflow improvements that increase quality and efficiency



What We're Looking For

 - 3–5+ years of full-cycle technical recruiting experience, ideally with time spent in-house at a high-growth startup

 - Proven track record closing strong engineering candidates in a competitive market

 - Deep sourcing chops — you're not waiting on inbound; you know how to find people and get them interested

 - Strong technical literacy — you don't need to code, but you can hold a real conversation about tech stacks, system design, and engineering culture

 - High ownership mentality and comfort operating without a playbook

 - Builder mindset — excited to create process and structure where there isn't any

 - Familiarity with the recruiting industry or marketplace businesses is a plus (and genuinely interesting to us)




ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.



Our mission is to make hiring fast, reliable, and scalable for every company in the world.



At Paraform, we believe recruiting works best when the right people are working on the right problems, combining human judgment with AI that truly understands hiring. That’s why we’re building a new foundation for how companies hire, bringing together specialized recruiters and modern AI tools.



We treat recruiters like entrepreneurs, not vendors – and we’re building the financial, operational, and technical infrastructure that powers their success.



We are backed by the best investors and technology leaders: Felicis, A*, BOND, Liquid 2, DST Global, the founders of YouTube, Instacart, Canva, and more.

source_jobs.title: Strategic Projects Lead
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for an entrepreneurial operator to own Paraform’s most complex and highest-impact customer engagements—and to sit at the center of how the marketplace scales.

Paraform’s customer base is growing rapidly (hundreds of new customers a month!), and Strategic Project Leads (SPLs) are Paraform’s essential operators—connecting the work of sales, supply, engineering, and operations to deliver customer results and drive revenue. As an SPL, you’ll partner closely with founders, executives, and senior talent leaders to solve their most critical business problem: building world-class teams, fast.

Every engagement is different—from helping a defense-tech company build a security-cleared engineering team to advising a Series A founder on their first leadership hires. These are high-stakes, strategic builds that directly impact a company’s ability to scale.

This role blends client ownership, structured problem-solving, and operational execution. You’ll lead end-to-end engagements and partner cross-functionally to shape how Paraform’s product and delivery model evolve as the business scales.

We’re looking for someone who can operate comfortably in multiple modes: as a trusted advisor, bringing judgment, structure, and informed pushback to senior decision-makers; as a hands-on operator, coordinating across the marketplace to drive quality, speed, and consistency; and as a strategic problem-solver, leading initiatives that help Paraform’s model evolve as we scale.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 2+ years of experience working closely with customers and having full ownership across relevant areas such as operations, strategic projects, or account management

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication

 - Entrepreneurial experience and mindset - you are excited about building things from scratch, are able to identify issues and execute quickly

 - Ability to come up with creative solutions to complex, ambiguous operational problems and resourceful in identifying opportunities and executing against them

 - Ability to manage multiple work streams and priorities at once; exceptional 80/20 skills




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Own customer engagements end-to-end: Build credibility with founders, CXOs, and senior operators; drive execution across complex, high-stakes searches; use data to influence hiring outcomes.

 - Leverage Paraform’s recruiter capacity: Translate customer needs into action by mobilizing the right recruiters and ensuring consistently strong outcomes that drive retention and long-term partnerships.

 - Serve as the voice of the customer: Advocate for a truly differentiated experience by feeding insight across the business and influence when needed to drive the best possible outcomes.

 - Shape how delivery evolves: Lead strategic projects that influence how Paraform shows up for customers as we scale, partnering closely with sales, supply, product, and engineering

This role is well-suited for high-performers with ~2–5 years of experience who have spent significant time working with senior leaders- in consulting, high-growth startups, or similarly demanding, ambiguous environments- and who are ready to own real outcomes in a fast-moving marketplace. This is a unique opportunity to take a strategic, customer-facing skillset and launch into a high-impact operational role that drives revenue.






ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.



Our mission is to make hiring fast, reliable, and scalable for every company in the world.



At Paraform, we believe re

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

Paraform is looking for an experienced Executive Assistant to support our CEO and CTO as we continue to scale. This role is ideal for someone who has 5+ years of experience supporting senior executives, thrives in fast-moving environments, and takes pride in making complex, high-stakes days run seamlessly.



You’ll act as mission control for our leadership team, owning calendars, inboxes, and logistics with precision, anticipating needs before they arise, and creating the space for our executives to focus on building and scaling the business.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Own complex calendar management and scheduling for the CEO and CTO across internal and external stakeholders

 - Manage inbox triage and correspondence, ensuring priorities are surfaced and nothing slips through the cracks

 - Handle light office management and day-to-day operational needs

 - Support a variety of special projects and time-sensitive requests as they arise

 - Act as a trusted partner, be proactive, detail-oriented, and calm under pressure




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of experience as an Executive Assistant

 - Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail

 - Strong judgment, discretion, and ability to handle sensitive information

 - A proactive, resourceful mindset, you don’t wait to be told what needs doing

 - Comfortable operating in a high-growth, fast-paced startup environment

 - If you love being behind the scenes making everything run smoothly and want to play a meaningful role in supporting leadership at a growing company, we’d love to meet you




BENEFITS:

 - Competitive Compensation

 - Premium Healthcare

 - Commuter Stipend

 - Lunch and Dinner catered on-site

 - Gym Membership

 - 401k

 - Flexible PTO

source_jobs.title: Founding GTM Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

Paraform is disrupting how companies hire — and we're looking for someone to help us hire the best people to do it. We're looking for an experienced, high-powered Founding GTM Recruiter who lives and breathes talent and is an expert working with early stage and high growth startups. You'll primarily be focused on sourcing top 1% talent to join the Paraform team, driving a culture of excellence, and supporting the company with everything else hiring-related as we rapidly scale.



What You'll Do

 - Full-Cycle Recruiting: Own sourcing, screening, interviewing, and closing candidates across multiple functions

 - Talent Strategy: Work with the founders and hiring managers to set our talent bar, hiring goals, candidate experience, and employer branding

 - Talent Operations: Own candidate coordination, recruiting tools (including Paraform!), and continuously improve our hiring processes and structures

 - People Ops: Have the option to own HR/People Ops in the interim on an as-needed basis

 - Promote Paraform: Serve as a genuine ambassador for Paraform's mission — you should be able to speak credibly about our product, our market, and why the best candidates should want to work here



What We're Looking For

 - 3–5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience for non-technical and GTM roles, ideally with time spent in-house at a high-growth startup

 - Proven track record closing strong candidates in a competitive market

 - Deep sourcing chops — you're not waiting on inbound; you know how to find people and get them interested

 - High ownership mentality and comfort operating without a playbook

 - Builder mindset — excited to create process and structure where there isn't any

 - Familiarity with the recruiting industry or marketplace businesses is a plus (and genuinely interesting to us)

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
We're hiring a hungry Sales Development Representative to drive new business for Paraform.

You'll drive mid-market and enterprise deals, but help build out the playbook and continue Paraform's exponential growth. Folks need to be willing to grind, but we also need creative thinkers who have high clockspeed, can implement time-saving structure & process, and generate new ideas that accelerate growth.

As an early business hire, you'll work closely with our GTM leadership team to expand Paraform's global footprint, and build a world-class sales team.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 1 - 5 years of experience as a top performing SDR and/or AE at a high velocity startup or in finance

 - Top performer - track record of top sales performance: quick promotions, consistently beating quota

 - Have done something most people haven't – started a company, won a hackathon, qualified for the Olympics, etc.

 - Previously cold-outbounded your way into at least one incredible opportunity you had no business getting




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Source new sales opportunities through inbound qualification and outbound outreach

 - Qualify prospects through consultative selling

source_jobs.title: Growth Manager
source_jobs.description:
We are looking for an entrepreneurial operator to build and scale out a world class portfolio of recruiting firms. As an account manager for our supply-side, you’ll act as a trusted advisor to business owners — helping them optimize their Paraform usage, improve day-to-day operations, and identify opportunities to grow revenue and performance. This is one of the most cross-functional, high-leverage roles at Paraform. You’ll work directly with our top agencies to design new systems, and drive liquidity across the marketplace.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 4 - 8 years of experience working closely with customers and owning revenue execution across account management or startup operations

 - Experience in customer-facing post-sales or operations roles

 - Experience owning a revenue target (not just retention)

 - Early stage startup experience series A to pre-IPO

 - Top university or top GPA


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own high-stakes relationships. Advise top recruiters on growth strategy and operational excellence.

 - Scale the supply engine. Identify bottlenecks from onboarding to retention and design systems that help recruiters perform.

 - Run marketplace experiments. Test incentive programs, workflows, and automations that improve liquidity.

 - Bridge ops and product. Translate daily insights into internal tools and product improvements.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT

 - Massive impact. The recruiters you manage drive hundreds of thousands of $ in GMV - your decisions move real revenue.

 - True cross-functionality. You’ll sit across operations, product, and GTM - collaborating with every team.

 - Future-founder training ground. Similar to Uber’s early driver ops or DoorDash's merchant success, you’ll learn how to scale a supply network from 0→1.

 - Fast pace, full ownership. You’ll have autonomy to ship, iterate, and see results every week.




ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.



Our mission is to make hiring fast, reliable, and scalable for every company in the world.



At Paraform, we believe recruiting works best when the right people are working on the right problems, combining human judgment with AI that truly understands hiring. That’s why we’re building a new foundation for how companies hire, bringing together specialized recruiters and modern AI tools.



We treat recruiters like entrepreneurs, not vendors – and we’re building the financial, operational, and technical infrastructure that powers their success.



We are backed by the best investors and technology leaders: Felicis, A*, BOND, Liquid 2, DST Global, the founders of YouTube, Instacart, Canva, and more.

source_jobs.title: Marketplace Quant
source_jobs.description:
For a Marketplace Quant, we are looking for a strong quantitative background specifically applied to pricing, financial data or risk assessment. We are looking for someone who can fluidly turn quantitative insight into actionable shifts in pricing and payment.



Qualifications

 - Application to economics (behavioral economics, pricing models, game theory) or financial data is more important than data engineering/coding experience

 - Need strong SQL at minimum, ideally experience with python/R for stats

 - Best degrees are math/physics, economics, statistics, CS is fine only if the Econ exposure is there

 - Top-tier quantitative program or strong financial services background (fintech is good too)



Responsibilities

 - Use statistical methods in order to evaluate ML models as they apply to a dynamic marketplace

 - Design concrete incentives and comp structures to improve marketplace efficiency

 - Work across teams to improve operational processes based on data findings

 - Scale tools used to conduct experiments and measure ROI

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
We're looking for an experienced and dynamic AE who can not only crush our current pipeline and close mid-market and enterprise deals, but help build out the playbook and continue Paraform's exponential growth.

Folks need to be willing to grind, but we also need creative thinkers who have high clockspeed, can implement time-saving structure & process, and generate new ideas that accelerate growth.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 3 - 8 years of experience selling software or services to tech companies at a high-growth startup

 - Significant outbound prospecting experience

 - Track record of top sales performance: quick promotions, President's club, consistently beating quota

 - Outstanding achievements in some other competitive domain (varsity sports in college, degree from a top university, etc)




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Be in charge of all inbound leads, generate pipeline, and close deals

 - Implementing time-saving structure & process.

 - Generate new ideas that accelerate growth.

source_jobs.title: Manager, Sales Development
source_jobs.description:
We're hiring a Sales Development Manager to drive pipeline for Paraform.

You'll manage our existing team of sales development representatives and be responsible for further building out the SDR team, and establishing the best practices of this motion. This is a hybrid inbound and outbound SDR team who is responsible for new logo opportunity creation through traditional outbound channels like phone, email, linkedin, etc.




WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 1 - 3 years of experience as a top performing Sales Development Manager at a software company ideally

 - Top performer - track record of top sales performance: quick promotions, consistently beating quota

 - Strong analytical and reporting around sales performance

 - Growth minded, both personally as well as for the people working for you




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Manage pipeline generation across the SDR team

 - Create best practices for converting pipeline across all channels (inbound, outbound, events, etc)

 - Report on sales performance to upper management

 - Hire and grow the team

 - Foster a competitive, high performance environment

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Nearly $900B is spent on recruiting every year and the process is still broken. Paraform is building the global talent infrastructure where companies come to fill their most critical roles. Through every search, placement, and interaction on our platform, we capture proprietary hiring data that no one else has at scale, and that data powers the agentic systems we're building to make hiring faster, smarter, and more precise. We believe AI will create more jobs, not less https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jevons_paradox. As companies move faster with fewer constraints, they'll hire more ambitiously and for roles that didn't exist before, making the hiring layer more critical than ever.




THE ROLE

We have 15 engineers and close to 9 figures in revenue. That ratio is intentional. Every engineer at Paraform plays a massive role in shaping the direction of the business. We're looking for product engineers who think like builders, not just coders.

That means you're someone who can look at a problem our team is facing, figure out what to build, and ship it end to end. You'll have the autonomy to discover the problems worth solving, design the solutions, and own the outcomes. The surface area of unsolved problems here is enormous, and we need people who find that energizing rather than overwhelming.




WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON

Our product spans three major areas, each with deep, compounding challenges:

 - Marketplace: Build the systems that acquire and match candidates at scale. Improve the experience for both companies and recruiters, and help us build towards a self-sustaining marketplace.

 - AI Matching: Use the immense amount of data that we capture across our platform to build agentic recruiting systems that surface strong matches between candidates, companies, and recruiters.

 - Recruiting OS: Build the tools that make Paraform the place where recruiters do their best work (Recruiter CRM, AI-assisted workflows, and deep integrations that remove friction from every step of the process)




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Product-minded: You form strong opinions about what to build and why, informed by user behavior, data, and first-principles thinking

 - Business-minded: You think about impact in terms of revenue, retention, and market dynamics, not just shipped features

 - Technically sharp: You can move fast across the stack without sacrificing quality where it matters

 - High ownership: You identify what needs to exist, make the plan, and go build it

Your work will directly shape how companies hire and how thousands of people find their next role. If you want to operate at the intersection of product, engineering, and business, this is the job for you.




ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.



Our mission is to make hiring fast, reliable, and scalable for every company in the world.



At Paraform, we believe recruiting works best when the right people are working on the right problems, combining human judgment with AI that truly understands hiring. That’s why we’re building a new foundation for how companies hire, bringing together specialized recruiters and modern AI tools.



We treat recruiters like entrepreneurs, not vendors – and we’re building the financial, operational, and technical infrastructure that powers their success.



We are backed by the best investors and technology leaders: Felicis, A*, BOND, Liquid 2, DST Global, the founders of YouTube, Instacart, Canva, and more.

source_jobs.description:

Through every search, placement, and interaction on our platform, we capture proprietary hiring data that no one else has at scale, and that data powers the agentic systems we're building to make hiring faster, smarter, and more precise. We believe AI will create more jobs, not less https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jevons_paradox. As companies move faster with fewer constraints, they'll hire more ambitiously and for roles that didn't exist before, making the hiring layer more critical than ever.




THE ROLE

We have 15 engineers and $80M in ARR. That ratio is intentional. Every engineer at Paraform plays a massive role in shaping the direction of the business.

We're hiring a Software Engineer to work on our marketplace, the core of how Paraform connects companies with recruiters and candidates. You'll work closely with our marketplace product lead, shipping features that directly impact hiring manager experience, recruiter activation, and hiring outcomes.




WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

Our marketplace is what makes Paraform work. You'll be building the systems and experiences that drive both sides of it:

 - User behavior and engagement: Understand user psychology and use it to shape how recruiters and hiring managers interact with the platform

 - Recruiter supply growth: Build the systems that bring new recruiters onto the platform, ramp them up quickly, and keep the quality bar high

 - Recruiter performance and incentives: Payments, incentive systems, and performance tooling that help recruiters do their best work on the platform

 - Role distribution: Ensure every open role on the platform gets the attention it deserves by balancing recruiter activity across the marketplace

 - Automation: Identify and automate manual processes that slow down recruiters, hiring managers, and internal operations




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1 - 6 years of experience shipping high quality code in fast-paced environment

 - Ships fast: You can take a well-defined problem and deliver a clean solution quickly

 - Impact-driven: You care about making the experience better for recruiters and hiring managers. You get excited when something you shipped drives real hiring outcomes

 - Technically sharp: You can move fast across the stack without sacrificing quality where it matters




WHY THIS ROLE

You'll have design and product support, clear priorities, and a team that ships constantly. Your work will directly shape how thousands of recruiters operate and how companies make their most important hires. If you want to build at a company where engineers punch well above their weight and the product actually matters, this is the job.

source_jobs.title: SMB Account Executive (Strategic Partnerships)
source_jobs.description:
About this role

We're looking for an experienced and dynamic AE who can not only close top recruiting agencies and independent recruiters, but help build the playbook that scales Paraform’s recruiter-side supply engine.



This is a hybrid role — part sales, part partnerships, part market shaper. We need people who can grind, but also think fast, build clean systems, and bring creative ideas to unlock growth.



What we look for:

 - 2 – 8 years of experience in sales, partnerships, or business development at a fast-moving startup

 - Experience selling to services businesses (recruiting, staffing, consulting, etc.)

 - Significant outbound prospecting experience — you know how to build your own book

 - Track record of top sales performance: quick promotions, quota-crusher, or top 10% performer

 - Strong interpersonal skills — you’re great at relationship-selling and know how to grow accounts

 - Bonus: exposure to recruiting or marketplaces



What you'll do:

 - Own recruiter acquisition end-to-end — source, pitch, close, and expand

 - Qualify for fit — identify which agencies belong on Paraform and who we should pass on

 - Build and refine outbound systems to grow pipeline

 - Account map and deepen high-potential partners over time

 - Help recruiters navigate onboarding, contracting, and early success

 - Implement structure and process that saves time and improves conversion

 - Be part of shaping how supply grows and scales at a category-defining marketplace

source_jobs.title: Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Nearly $900B is spent on recruiting every year and the process is still broken. Paraform is building the global talent infrastructure where companies come to fill their most critical roles. Through every search, placement, and interaction on our platform, we capture proprietary hiring data that no one else has at scale, and that data powers the agentic systems we're building to make hiring faster, smarter, and more precise. We believe AI will create more jobs, not less. As companies move faster with fewer constraints, they'll hire more ambitiously and for roles that didn't exist before, making the hiring layer more critical than ever.




THE ROLE

We have 15 engineers and $80M in ARR. That ratio is intentional. Every engineer at Paraform plays a massive role in shaping the direction of the business.

We're hiring a Backend Engineer to own the systems that everything else at Paraform runs on. A strong backend is what lets us move fast, ship reliably, and build the kind of product that candidates, hiring managers, and recruiters can actually depend on. The work is critical to the evolution of our product and business. The systems you build will directly shape what the product can do, how users experience it, and how quickly the rest of the team can ship. You'll own the full backend surface area and the decisions that come with it.




WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON

The backend is where Paraform's hardest engineering problems live. You'll be working on:

 - Performance and data: Optimize Postgres and the service layer to keep the platform fast as we grow.

 - Backend services: Own and extend the services that power matching, recruiter workflows, payments, and marketplace operations.

 - Integrations: Build and maintain integrations across the systems recruiters and hiring managers live in.

 - Infrastructure and CI/CD: Run the infra and pipelines that ship and operate Paraform. Improve observability, harden deploys, and make the system easier for the team to work in.

 - Auth and security: Strengthen authentication, access control, and data protection across the platform.

 - Internal AI tooling: Build the tools and infrastructure that let our team use AI effectively in their day-to-day work.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Deep backend expertise: You're fluent in backend systems, databases, and the tradeoffs that come with running production infrastructure

 - Pragmatic: You know when to optimize, when to rewrite, and when to leave it alone. You make decisions based on impact, not novelty

 - Operationally minded: You care about what happens after the code ships. Observability, reliability, and on-call experience are part of the job, not an afterthought

 - High ownership: You see a problem in the system and go fix it without waiting to be asked




WHY THIS ROLE

The backend at Paraform is the foundation everything else is built on, and there's more to do here than any one person can get to. You'll have the autonomy to pick the problems that matter most and the room to fix them properly. If you want to work on hard backend problems that shape how companies build their teams and how thousands of people find their next role, this is the job for you.

source_jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We’re looking for an Applied AI Engineer with 2-5 years of experience building and shipping AI systems used by real people. You’re comfortable working with modern LLM-based systems and agentic workflows, and you know how to turn powerful models into reliable product features. You have strong product judgment and think deeply about tradeoffs between LLM approaches and traditional ML when designing solutions. You care about evaluation, iteration speed, and making sure AI systems actually drive measurable business impact.



Experience building LLM-powered applications, retrieval systems, tool-using agents, or AI-driven automation is a plus. Familiarity with traditional ML techniques such as ranking, recommendation, or classification is helpful when designing hybrid systems that balance performance, cost, and reliability.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Design and build AI systems that power matchmaking, ranking, and automation across the Paraform marketplace.

 - Develop LLM-driven features such as retrieval pipelines, agentic workflows, and AI-powered automation that improve how recruiters and companies interact on the platform.

 - Own systems end-to-end, from data pipelines and prompt or model design to deployment, monitoring, and iteration in production.

 - Work closely with product, ML engineers, and full-stack teams to ship AI capabilities that directly move marketplace metrics.

 - Design evaluation frameworks that measure real-world performance, reliability, and business outcomes, not just offline model quality.

 - Help define best practices for building and operating production AI systems at Paraform, balancing model quality, cost, latency, and maintainability.

 - Raise the bar for how AI is integrated into product experiences across the platform.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 2 - 5 years of experience at a growing, AI native startup (series A - D)

 - Worked on products that have scales to a large number of users (not just for a single enterprise customer)

 - Strong Python and Typescript experience

 - You've built agentic systems that power real business or user outcomes

 - You thrive in ambiguous, 0 to 1 environments

 - You can explain technical tradeoffs to non-technical partners




ABOUT PARAFORM:

Paraform is a marketplace modernizing one of the largest and most fragmented markets in the world: hiring. We partner with industry leaders like Cursor, Palantir, Windsurf, Decagon, Shopify, Coinbase, and Hightouch to hire world-class talent, and are growing quickly - 8×-ing revenue last year.



Paraform is the first end-to-end AI recruiting marketplace that connects companies with thousands of specialized recruiters and AI agents that work together to fill roles faster and more accurately.

We treat recruiters like entrepreneurs, not vendors – and we’re building the financial, operational, and technical infrastructure that powers their success.

source_jobs.title: Applied ML Engineer
source_jobs.description:
What we’re looking for

We’re looking for an ML Engineer with 4–8 years of experience building and owning production AI and ML systems used by real people. You’re comfortable working with traditional ML and you’ve shipped systems with clear quality metrics and business impact. You have strong judgment around evaluation and know how to measure what actually matters when considering product priorities. Experience with large-scale retrieval, ranking, NLP, or personalization systems is a plus.



What you’ll do

 - Research and build AI/ML systems that power matchmaking, ranking, and automation across the Paraform marketplace.

 - Own model development end-to-end, from data collection and labeling strategies to deployment, monitoring, and iteration in production.

 - Partner with product, AI engineers, and full-stack teams to ship systems that directly move marketplace metrics.

 - Build and maintain robust evaluation frameworks to continuously measure quality, bias, reliability, and business impact.

 - Set technical direction and best practices for AI/ML at Paraform.
